summary: Added 8 hand-built novel commands (~1,300 LOC): usage cost-by, usage anomaly, models query, providers degraded, generation explain, key eta, budget set/check, endpoints failover. Plus 2 new parent group commands (usage, budget) and patches to 5 generated parents (root.go, models.go, generation.go, promoted_key.go, promoted_providers.go, promoted_endpoints.go) to register new subcommands.
reason: Phase 3 mandate (transcendence layer) — these are the agent-introspection commands that justify the CLI's existence beyond the absorbed REST surface. None are derivable from the spec.
validated_outcome: All 8 transcendence commands callable; behavioral assertions in shipcheck dogfood (96/102 PASS) + post-publish validation.
